description: Level substitution parameters for random map generation.

Name.description: Internal name identifier. Not read by 1.13c engine

Type.description: Substitution type index controlling tile replacement behavior. Not read by 1.13c engine

File.description: DS1 map file path for the substitution tile. Not read by 1.13c engine

CheckAll.description: Whether to check all tiles before substituting or stop at first match. Not read by 1.13c engine

BordType.description: Border type for tile matching (-1 = any, 0 = none, 1-2 = specific edge types)

GridSize.description: Whether substitution snaps to grid boundaries

Dt1Mask.description: Bitmask controlling which DT1 tile files are used for substitution. Not read by 1.13c engine

Trials0.description: Number of placement attempts for substitution group 0 (-1 = unlimited). Not read by 1.13c engine

Max0.description: Property 0 maximum value. Not read by 1.13c engine

Trials1.description: Number of placement attempts for substitution group 1 (-1 = unlimited). Not read by 1.13c engine

Max1.description: Property 1 maximum value. Not read by 1.13c engine

Trials2.description: Number of placement attempts for substitution group 2 (-1 = unlimited). Not read by 1.13c engine

Max2.description: Property 2 maximum value. Not read by 1.13c engine

Trials3.description: Number of placement attempts for substitution group 3 (-1 = unlimited). Not read by 1.13c engine

Max3.description: Property 3 maximum value. Not read by 1.13c engine

Trials4.description: Number of placement attempts for substitution group 4 (-1 = unlimited). Not read by 1.13c engine

Max4.description: Property 4 maximum value. Not read by 1.13c engine

Beta.description: Beta content flag (unused). Not read by 1.13c engine
